text:
There was a pirate captain who was known as Bloodaxe Bill. One day he fell asleep resting his eyes upon some sandolls. In his sleep he dreamed he found treasure. Next morning he began to dig.

Suddenly his arm fell off! He kept digging anyway. After some time he found his arm. He wrapped it in seaweed. Then he dug again.

He found a chest! He got bored looking. He pulled out an axe. He chopped. A treasure trove! Silver coins. He felt happy.

Whoops. He found himself stuck! Too heavy.

Well, digger. He crawled out. He saw stones. He made a spear.

Some sailors passed. They saw him! He shouted.

"A treasure!"

They laughed. They stole things.

He cut them. He chased them.

One hit the anchor. It snapped!

They fell!

He plundered anyway.

There's another story too! It sounds weird. He married a unicorn!

They danced. They had babies.
